name: State Bank Of Burrton
description_short: State Bank of Burrton is a community bank in Kansas offering online banking, bill pay, and e-statements with free digital services.
description_long:
State Bank of Burrton is a traditional community bank headquartered in Burrton, Kansas. The bank operates from a physical location at 200 N. Burrton Ave and has been serving the local community with traditional banking services. Their online presence focuses on digital convenience for existing and prospective customers.

The bank offers free online banking services including online account access, bill pay functionality, and electronic statements. These core services are marketed as no-cost features to help customers manage finances remotely. The bank provides a routing number (101114565) for electronic transactions and maintains traditional customer service channels including phone (620-463-4060) and mailing address contact options.

State Bank of Burrton distinguishes itself as a local community institution rather than a large national chain. The bank maintains a physical branch presence and provides personal customer service through direct contact methods. Their free online banking offerings position them as accessible to customers seeking digital-first banking without monthly fees for basic services.

As a community bank, State Bank of Burrton serves primarily local residents and businesses in the Burrton, Kansas area. The website provides limited detail about deposit products, loan offerings, or interest rates. Prospective customers should contact the bank directly to learn about specific checking account types, savings products, CD rates, or lending services beyond what is advertised on their homepage.
services: Online banking login and account access
Account login with user ID and password
Physical branch banking at 200 N. Burrton Ave
pros: Free online banking with no advertised fees for digital access
Free online bill pay service included with online banking
Free e-statements available to reduce paper mail
Local community bank with physical branch presence in Burrton, Kansas
Multiple contact methods including phone (620-463-4060), email, and mailing address
Established routing number (#101114565) for standard ACH and wire transfers
cons: Website provides minimal information about deposit products, loan types, or interest rates
Limited details on account minimums, monthly fees for checking/savings accounts, or CD offerings
No information about mobile app availability or advanced digital banking features
Appears to be a very small local bank with limited geographic reach
No published information about business accounts, investment services, or credit products
best_for: Residents of Burrton, Kansas seeking local community banking with personal relationships
Customers who prefer online banking convenience without unnecessary fees
Small business owners in the local area needing basic commercial banking services
diagnosis: State Bank of Burrton is best for existing or prospective customers in the Burrton, Kansas area who value local community banking and want free online access to their accounts. The main caveat is that the public website lacks detailed information about specific products, rates, and fees—interested customers must contact the bank directly to understand their full service offerings and pricing.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
